title: More Nonsense Limerick 14
content:
There was an old person in black,
    A Grasshopper jumped on his back;
    When it chirped in his ear, 
    He was smitten with fear,
    That helpless old person in black.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 14" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
